vocab.word: be lost in a world of one's own
vocab.ipa: /bi lɒst ɪn ə wɜːrld əv wʌnz əʊn/
vocab.meaning: chìm đắm trong thế giới riêng của mình
vocab.example: During those long drives, I would often be lost in a world of my own, staring at the passing trees and inventing stories.

vocab.word: at the drop of a hat
vocab.meaning: ngay lập tức, không do dự
vocab.example: My parents would decide to go on a car trip at the drop of a hat, which always filled my childhood weekends with excitement.

vocab.meaning: một chủ đề/trải nghiệm không còn muốn nhắc đến hoặc rất khó hiểu
vocab.example: To be honest, the mechanics of how the car actually worked was a closed book to me as a kid; I just enjoyed the ride.
I must admit I sometimes threw a fit of pique when I was told I couldn't sit in the front seat next to my father.
We used to pull over on a whim whenever we saw an interesting roadside attraction or a local fruit stall.

vocab.meaning: khoảng thời gian tuyệt vời nhất
vocab.example: Looking back, those family car journeys were truly the best of times, despite the occasional boredom of the highway.

vocab.meaning: tự làm theo ý mình, không quan tâm quy tắc (thường nói về đứa trẻ nghịch ngợm trên xe)
vocab.example: In the back seat, my younger brother was a law unto himself, constantly turning the car into his personal playground.

vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể thiếu
vocab.example: Occasional car sickness was part and parcel of our long-distance travels, but it never dampened my spirits for long.
Seeing a rare vintage car on the road was something out of the ordinary that would keep me talking for the rest of the trip.

vocab.meaning: không ai sánh bằng, là tốt nhất
vocab.example: The feeling of freedom I got while sitting in the car with the windows rolled down was second to none.
